docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF YI PING SU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELA GARCIA FILED BY DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SU, YI PING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC MS. SU DID NOT HAVE ANY EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT THE STEAM FROM THE HEATER CAUSED ANY MOLD OR DAMAGE TO HER APT. ALSO, SHE HAD NO EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT HER ALLEGED HEALTH ISSUES. SHE RECEIVED FREE TOILET PAPER FROM THE HOUSING COMPLEX,SO SHE DID NOT HAVE TO BUY TOLET PAPER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,396.00 FILED BY SU, YI PING AS TO DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SU, YI PING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
